content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Petr and a Combination Lock". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1097/B
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, which is the number of wheels. The second line contains n space-separated integers representing the number of positions on each wheel.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Calculate the total number of combinations by multiplying the number of positions on each wheel.

code.Python3:
n = int(input())
res = 1
for _ in range(n):
    x = int(input())
    res *= x
print(res)
